inputs.label: Sphere (D)
inputs.businessContext: The spherical refractive error in diopters. Negative for myopia, positive for hyperopia.

businessContext_i18n.en: The spherical refractive error in diopters. Negative for myopia, positive for hyperopia.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Diyoptri cinsinden küresel kırma kusuru. Miyopi için negatif, hipermetropi için pozitif.

inputs.label: Cylinder (D)
inputs.businessContext: The cylindrical component in diopters, typically in minus cylinder notation. Represents astigmatism.

businessContext_i18n.en: The cylindrical component in diopters, typically in minus cylinder notation. Represents astigmatism.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Diyoptri cinsinden silindirik bileşen, tipik olarak eksi silindir notasyonunda. Astigmatizmayı temsil eder.

inputs.label: Axis (deg)
inputs.businessContext: The orientation of the cylinder axis in degrees, from 0 to 180.

businessContext_i18n.en: The orientation of the cylinder axis in degrees, from 0 to 180.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Silindir ekseninin derece cinsinden yönü, 0 ile 180 arasında.

inputs.label: Vertex Distance (mm)
inputs.businessContext: The distance from the back vertex of the spectacle lens to the cornea, typically 12-14 mm. Used to correct the prescription for the spectacle plane.

businessContext_i18n.en: The distance from the back vertex of the spectacle lens to the cornea, typically 12-14 mm. Used to correct the prescription for the spectacle plane.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gözlük camının arka tepe noktasından korneaya olan mesafe, tipik olarak 12-14 mm. Reçeteyi gözlük düzlemine göre düzeltmek için kullanılır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
